args:
set -eu
rg -n 'VLLM_TARGET_DEVICE|VLLM_USE_PRECOMPILED|VLLM_USE_PRECOMPILED_RUST|VLLM_MAIN_CUDA_VERSION' vllm/setup.py vllm/tests/test_envs.py >/dev/null
rg -n 'Unsupported VLLM build profile' vllm/vllm/build_profiles.py vllm/tests/test_build_profiles.py >/dev/null
printf 'vllm-setup-invalid-envs\n'
